name: FPS Robot Attack Minigame
short_description: Minigame where you have to destroy robots to save the world
detailed_description:
This game was created with Unity on the basis of the Unity project "FPS Microgame".

FPS Robot Attack Minigame is a 3D First Person Shooter Game where you have to destroy robots to save the world

You can play both with the Joystick (any / Xbox favorite) and with the keyboard.

- 19 Levels
- 3 types of weapons

DESTROY THE ROBOTS AND SAVE THE WORLD !!!!

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Traditional Chinese, Japanese, Dutch, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Portuguese - Portugal, Spanish - Latin America
